ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hockey_players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Level of experience of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the seasons table */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the hockey_players table */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the games table */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the game */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes served by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the hockey_players table */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the seasons table */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes served by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season_id")
)
